title: verbascum austroiranicum
intro: Verbascum austroiranicum, also known as Iranian mullein or Persian mullein, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mullein family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum austroiranicum include its ability to soothe and calm respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits, and its leaves, flowers, and roots are often used in herbal preparations.
